column1: # EU Consolidated Sanctions - Optional Local Drop-in (Task 4)
# The code now automatically fetches fresh EU sanctions data on startup
# This dataset is kept up-to-date daily and sources the **exact same official EU
# Consolidated list** that powers the page you linked:
# No manual action is required for normal operation.
# If you want to use a specific snapshot or the direct official export:
# 1. Download from https://webgate.ec.europa.eu/fsd/fsf (Consolidated CSV or XML)
# 3. The local file takes precedence over the automatic OpenSanctions fetch.
# The system will still fall back to automatic if the local file is missing or unparseable.
